sentences.text: Good morning, Michelle. This is Josh or rentable for are scheduled follow, up at nine AM give me a call when you get a chance. This is my cell at six five one seven one seven five six three four I'm on the zoom call. If you just want to jump and I'll be waiting for a few more minutes. So let me know give me a call or I'll just jump on the gym or else. You can email me as well thanks Joe.
